name: Chili Ala Capt. James Mcdonnell
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dark red kidney beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage, ground meat, onion, and garlic in a pot.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (except beans) to the pot. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 1 1/4 hours.
3. After cooking, add the beans and stir gently.
4. Serve topped with grated Monterey Jack cheese and finely chopped scallions.
